name: skill-arsenal
description: A curated collection of reusable Claude skills organized by category

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Adversarial code review that breaks the self-review monoculture. Three hostile personas (Saboteur, New Hire, Security Auditor) — each must find at least one issue. BLOCK / CONCERNS / CLEAN verdict.

plugins.name: code-audit-planner
plugins.description: Audit a codebase across many dimensions (DRY/reuse, organization, logic errors, test quality, UX, theming, spec drift) and produce a self-contained implementation-plan folder of ordered, verifiable tasks. Plans only; never edits source.

plugins.name: task-plan-architect
plugins.description: Research a large task and produce a detailed, mapped implementation plan that a smaller model can execute without losing the big picture — the parts, how they connect, and an ordered set of self-contained tasks. Saves the plan outside the repo by default.

plugins.name: design-review-loop
plugins.description: Iterative multi-agent design review-and-build loop for UI work. Captures live screenshots, fans out specialist reviewers (UX, UI craft, Apple HIG, design-system, accessibility), reconciles findings, builds the changes, and repeats until scores clear a threshold.

plugins.name: fusion-reasoning
plugins.description: A reasoning amplifier for hard problems — runs an adaptively-sized panel of independent Claude agents, optionally has them cross-examine, and a judge synthesizes consensus, resolves contradictions, and surfaces blind spots into one unified result.

plugins.name: spec-docs-generator
plugins.description: Generate or update a numbered spec-document set (docs/00-index.md, docs/NN-topic.md, ADRs) that becomes the source of truth an agent obeys when writing code. Detects existing specs, diffs them against the code, and fixes drift.

plugins.name: frontend-code-layout
plugins.description: Keep frontend code's structure, styling, and behavior separable. Realizes the CSS Zen Garden ideal (swap the look without rewriting structure) via semantic tokens, Model/View/Presenter layering, and readability hygiene.

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Reviews a GitHub pull request for real blocking problems nobody has flagged yet — correctness bugs, security gaps, broken contracts, data races, unmet acceptance criteria. Verifies every concern against the code; returns APPROVE or confirmed blockers. Never posts to GitHub on its own.

plugins.name: efficient-orchestration
plugins.description: Always-on token-efficiency operating model. For every non-trivial task, decide inline vs. delegate to cheaper subagents, monitor token spend, and checkpoint when work runs deep. The large model holds strategy and verification; mechanical work fans out to the smallest capable model.

plugins.name: planrunner
plugins.description: Orchestrator-driven execution of an approved plan. The main loop acts as orchestrator + reviewer: decomposes the plan into small slices, delegates each to an implementer subagent, verifies every slice against intent, then runs up to 3 adversarial review rounds fixing real blockers.
